auth.signupCheckEmail: Account created! Please check your email for a confirmation link.
auth.signupEmailExists: An account with this email already exists. Please log in instead.

settings.title: User Settings
settings.logoutConfirmMsg: Are you sure you want to logout?
settings.preferencesDesc: Preferences are managed through conversation with the agent. Use the button below to update them.
settings.noPreferencesYet: No preferences set yet. Use the button below to set up your profile.
settings.resetConfirmMsg: This will clear all your preferences (risk tolerance, investment style, agent settings). You can set them up again anytime via the agent. Are you sure?
settings.completeProfileDesc: Set up your stocks, risk tolerance, and preferences through a quick conversation.
settings.defaultModelDesc: Used for workspace conversations (code execution, sandbox).
settings.flashModelDesc: Used for quick queries without sandbox (web search, market data).
settings.byokDesc: Provide your own API keys to bypass credit limits.
settings.byokTooltip: Your API keys are stored using AES encryption and are never visible in plaintext. If you choose to delete a key, it is permanently removed from our records.
settings.parentProviderDesc: Inherits SDK and settings from the parent provider.
settings.providerNameInvalid: Only letters, numbers, hyphens and underscores allowed
settings.customModelsDesc: Define custom model entries to use with your BYOK API keys.
settings.customModelNameInvalid: Name must start with alphanumeric, max 63 chars, only .-_ allowed
settings.customModelNameConflict: Name conflicts with a system model
settings.customModelProviderNoKey: No API key configured for provider "{{provider}}". Add a BYOK key first.
settings.connectedAccountsDesc: Connect external accounts to use models through your existing subscriptions.
settings.codexDesc: Use Codex models with your ChatGPT subscription
settings.codexStep1Desc: A new tab will open to OpenAI's authorization page. Log in with your ChatGPT account.
settings.codexStep2Desc: A short code (e.g. ABCD-EFGH) will appear right here. Copy it and enter it on the OpenAI page to authorize access.
settings.codexStep3Desc: Once approved, we'll automatically detect it and connect your account. No copy-pasting needed.
settings.codexSecurityDesc: Your OAuth tokens are encrypted at rest (AES-256 via pgp_sym_encrypt) and only decrypted when making API calls on your behalf. We never store your OpenAI password. Tokens can be revoked at any time by disconnecting.
settings.codexDisclaimerDesc: Ginlix is not affiliated with, endorsed by, or sponsored by OpenAI. By proceeding, you connect your ChatGPT subscription at your own discretion and responsibility. Usage is subject to OpenAI's Terms of Service.
settings.codexTimeout: Authorization timed out. Please try again.
settings.codexFlowFailed: Failed to start Codex device code flow
settings.claudeDesc: Use Claude models with your Anthropic subscription
settings.claudeStep1Desc: A new tab will open to claude.ai where you sign in and authorize access.
settings.claudeStep2Desc: After approval, you'll see a code on the page. Copy the entire value.
settings.claudeStep3Desc: Paste the code into the input field to complete the connection.
settings.claudeSecurityDesc: Your tokens are encrypted at rest (AES-256 via pgp_sym_encrypt) and only decrypted when making API calls on your behalf. Tokens can be revoked at any time by disconnecting.
settings.claudeDisclaimerDesc: Ginlix is not affiliated with, endorsed by, or sponsored by Anthropic. By proceeding, you connect your Anthropic subscription at your own discretion and responsibility. Usage is subject to Anthropic's Terms of Service.
settings.claudePastePrompt: After authorizing on claude.ai, paste the code shown on the page below:
settings.claudePasteError: Failed to exchange code. Please try again.
settings.starredModelsDesc: Starred models appear in the chat input for quick switching

dashboard.title: LangAlpha
dashboard.searchPlaceholder: Search by symbol or company name...
dashboard.contactMessage: If you have any questions or suggestions, please contact us through the following methods
dashboard.prefIncompleteMsg: Your preference information is not complete. Please complete your preferences to get the best experience with the agent.
dashboard.failedOnboarding: Failed to set up onboarding. Please try again.
dashboard.failedPrefUpdate: Failed to start preference update. Please try again.

workspace.welcomeDesc: Get started by setting up your preferences or creating a workspace.
workspace.failedLoadWorkspaces: Failed to load workspaces. Please refresh the page.
workspace.failedDeleteWorkspace: Failed to delete workspace. Please try again.
workspace.filesUploadNote: Uploaded after workspace is created · 50 MB max per file
workspace.descModeAgentHint: The agent will set up the workspace description from your first conversation

thread.startConversation: Start a conversation to create your first thread
thread.failedLoadThreads: Failed to load threads. Please refresh the page.
thread.failedDeleteThread: Failed to delete thread. Please try again.
thread.failedRenameThread: Failed to rename thread. Please try again.

share.anyoneWithLink: Anyone with this link can view the conversation.

chat.planFeedbackHint: Type your feedback to revise the plan, then send.
chat.interruptedHint: Agent interrupted. Feel free to provide new instructions.
chat.placeholderPendingRejection: Describe how to revise the plan...
chat.placeholderInterrupted: Send new instructions to the agent...
chat.placeholderLoading: Type a follow-up — it will be queued...
chat.placeholderSubagentsRunning: Workers still running. Send a message or click a worker to instruct it.

slashCommand.subagentDesc: Use subagents to complete this task
slashCommand.summarizeDesc: Compact conversation context to free up token space
slashCommand.offloadDesc: Offload large tool arguments to sandbox filesystem
slashCommand.comps-analysisDesc: Comparable company analysis: operating metrics, valuation multiples, peer benchmarking
slashCommand.dcf-modelDesc: DCF valuation: free cash flow projections, WACC, terminal value, sensitivity analysis
slashCommand.earnings-previewDesc: Pre-earnings analysis: consensus estimates, key metrics to watch, bull/base/bear scenarios
slashCommand.idea-generationDesc: Stock screening and idea generation: quantitative screens, thematic analysis, shortlist
slashCommand.check-modelDesc: Financial model audit: structural checks, formula validation, integrity testing
slashCommand.morning-noteDesc: Daily research briefing: overnight news, pre-market movers, earnings, macro events
slashCommand.catalyst-calendarDesc: Event tracker: earnings dates, economic releases, conferences, regulatory events
slashCommand.check-deckDesc: Investment deck QC: number consistency, data-narrative alignment, IB language, formatting audit
slashCommand.thesis-trackerDesc: Investment thesis scorecard: track pillars, risks, catalysts, and conviction over time
slashCommand.model-updateDesc: Update financial model with new quarterly actuals, revised estimates, and updated price target
slashCommand.3-statement-modelDesc: Integrated 3-statement financial model: linked income statement, balance sheet, and cash flow
slashCommand.earnings-analysisDesc: Post-earnings analysis report: beat/miss breakdown, estimate revisions, thesis impact, charts
slashCommand.sector-overviewDesc: Industry landscape report: market size, competitive dynamics, company profiles, valuation context
slashCommand.competitive-analysisDesc: Competitive landscape analysis: positioning, scorecards, moat assessment, market share trends
slashCommand.initiating-coverageDesc: Full equity research initiation: company research, financial model, valuation, charts, 30-50 page report
slashCommand.report-issueDesc: Report issues and propose fixes to improve agent capabilities

modelSelector.incompatibleSdk: Cannot switch to this model in the current session (different provider)

filePanel.editingHint: Editing — changes are not saved until you press Save
filePanel.discardUnsaved: You have unsaved changes. Discard them?
filePanel.confirmSave: Save changes? This will overwrite the file in the sandbox and cannot be undone.
filePanel.fileTooLarge: File is too large to edit in the browser (>500KB)
filePanel.loadEditFailed: Failed to load file for editing

automation.deleteConfirmMsg: Are you sure you want to delete "{{name}}"? This action cannot be undone.
automation.cronHelp: 5-field cron: minute hour day-of-month month day-of-week

toolArtifact.no8KFilings: No 8-K filings found in the last {{days}} days.
toolArtifact.resultTooLarge: Result too large to display inline
toolArtifact.resultSavedToFilesystem: The full result has been saved to the workspace filesystem.
